tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — Tailwind Config + Global Styles + Shared Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Establish the design token foundation that all other tasks depend on.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/tailwind.config.js`
- Modify: `frontend/src/index.css`
- Create: `frontend/src/components/ui/Card.jsx`
- Create: `frontend/src/components/ui/CardLabel.jsx`
- Create: `frontend/src/components/ui/ProgressBar.jsx`

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run dev` starts without errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/tailwind.config.js", "frontend/src/index.css", "frontend/src/components/ui/Card.jsx", "frontend/src/components/ui/CardLabel.jsx", "frontend/src/components/ui/ProgressBar.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tailwindcss --help > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tailwind config has all color/shadow tokens", "index.css sets body defaults", "Shared components render with new tokens"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: App Shell — Sidebar + Quick Capture
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply warm palette to sidebar and quick capture modal.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/QuickCapture.jsx`

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx", "frontend/src/components/QuickCapture.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sidebar uses surface/edge/primary tokens", "Active nav items use surface-accent", "Quick capture modal uses new tokens"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Dashboard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Transform dashboard with warm palette and time-based greeting.

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Uses shared Card/CardLabel/ProgressBar", "Time-based greeting with user name", "Deadline badges use deadline-* tokens"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: E2E Tests + Lint Verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify E2E tests still pass and run final lint.

**Files:** No modifications expected.

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../e2e && npx playwright test --reporter=list`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint && cd ../e2e && npx playwright test --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Lint passes with no errors", "E2E tests pass"]}
```
